name: Curry Salmon with Broccoli

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

ingredients.item: of uncooked long grain white rice
cans condensed cream of celery soup
salmon fillets, bones and skin removed

method: Preheat an oven to a heat 200°C/400°F. Grease the 9x13-in. baking dish.
Boil water and rice in a pot. Cover. Lower heat to low. Simmer for 25
On baking dish’s bottom, put broccoli. In a bowl, mix curry, wine,
mayonnaise and cream of celery soup. Evenly pour ½ over broccoli. Slice
salmon to chunks. Put into baking dish. Put leftover soup mixture over.
In preheated oven, bake for approximately about 45 minutes till fish easily
flakes with a fork and broccoli is tender. Serve it on cooked rice.
